bird.name: 紐西蘭潛鴨
bird.summary: 紐西蘭潛鴨（學名：Aythya novaeseelandiae，毛利語：papango, matapouri, titiporangi, raipo）是紐西蘭的一種潛水鴨，為紐西蘭的特有種。 外形 紐西蘭潛鴨體長40—46厘米（16—18英寸），大致呈深棕色至灰色，雄鴨頭部稍帶…

relations.subject: 紐西蘭潛鴨
relations.evidence: During the late 1800s and early 1900s, New Zealand scaup populations declined due to habitat destruction, introduction of predators and duck hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 紐西蘭潛鴨
relations.evidence: During the late 1800s and early 1900s, New Zealand scaup populations declined due to habitat destruction, introduction of predators and duck hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
